text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compilation of the two different series: ALL'S RIGHT WITH THE WORLD - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic and GOD'S IN HIS HEAVEN - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic into a single volume and it was published by Movic on 01 November 2006. https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BD%E3%83%AD%E3%82%B8%E3%83%BC%E3%83%99%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A4%E3%82%B7%E3%83%A5%E3%83%BC%E2%80%95%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BD%E3%83%AD%E3%82%B8%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B3%E3%83%9F%E3%83%83%E3%82%AF/dp/4896017358
